channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Behavior of teen in mosque shooting led police to seize family guns a year before attack
item.description: Court records reveal new details about one of two teenagers who killed three people at a San Diego mosque.

item.title: San Francisco immigration court shuts down after purge of judges, leaving asylum cases in chaos
Trump immunity from IRS audit shocks experts, who warn it could undermine trust in tax system
